name: SCHEUERMANN DISEASE
definition: SPINAL OSTEOCHONDROSIS = KYPHOSIS DORSALIS JUVENILIS = VERTEBRAL disorder consisting of vertebral wedging + endplate irregularity + narrowing of intervertebral

demographics.Prevalence: in 31% (21%) of males (females) with back pain
demographics.Location: lower thoracic / upper lumbar vertebrae; in mild cases limited to 3-4 vertebral
